title: Disable chat
body:
### Disable Chat

Do you want to disable in-game chat and explore new ways to communicate? Whether you're using CC:Tweaked phones, proximity chat, or NONE and you just wanna remove chat then this mod is perfect for you!  

I created this mod for my server to encourage players to use custom communication methods, like CC:Tweaked phones, instead of the default chat system. 

---

### How to Set It Up  

1. **Add the mod to your server.**  
   No client side installation is required!  

2. **How It Works:**  
   The mod automatically cancels all incoming chat messages disabling chat across the server.  

Now you're ready to build your own unique communication system! Or just disable it for other reasons.
---
### Q/A

Q: Will this make commands unusable?
A: No it just cancels server messages from getting to the server not commands.

Q: Will you update this mod freq?
A: Maybe...
